LanguageData.HC_SlotMachineBlue.description: High stake slots, default stake is 6$.
LanguageData.HC_SlotMachineBlue.label: Rim of Fortune
LanguageData.HC_SlotMachineGreen.description: Medium priced slots, default stake is 4$.
LanguageData.HC_SlotMachineGreen.label: Rima Moolah
LanguageData.HC_SlotMachineRed.description: Classic slots, default stake is only 2$, perfect for beginners.
LanguageData.HC_SlotMachineRed.label: Rim n Reels
